target_cmd: curl -s https://www.solaceagi.com/founder | head -c 2000 | grep -c 'Phuc\|story\|mission\|believe\|built' | python3 -c "import sys; n=int(sys.stdin.read().strip()); print('ORIGIN_STORY:', n, 'keywords - POWERFUL' if n >= 3 else 'ORIGIN_STORY:', n, 'keywords - WEAK')"
target_name: Stan Lee Attack — Does the Founder Page Tell an Origin Story?
context: Stan Lee oracle (q-agi-053): Founder page has 4 keyword matches (Phuc/story/mission/believe/built) in first 2000 chars. This PASSES — there IS an origin story foundation. Stan Lee's deeper question: does the page make you FEEL something? 4 keyword matches is good but Stan would ask: is Phuc the HERO of the story? Is the VILLAIN (status quo: manual work, broken trust) named? Does the user see themselves JOINING the mission? The data passes; the emotion needs human verification.
